findings.description: RST-specific markup `:java:extdoc:`WebUtil <nablarch.common.web.WebUtil>`` is preserved verbatim in the body text of s6. This syntax is not valid in a JSON/markdown knowledge file and will render as garbled text for AI consumers.
findings.source_evidence: Source RST: `:java:extdoc:`WebUtil <nablarch.common.web.WebUtil>` クラスを使うことで` — this should be converted to plain text, e.g., `WebUtil` を使うことで...

findings.description: Hint `InjectForm` appears in s11 hints but is not mentioned anywhere in the provided source. The source only references `:ref:`inject_form_interceptor`` without naming a class `InjectForm`.
findings.source_evidence: Source s11: 「ウェブアプリケーションのユーザ入力値のチェックは :ref:`inject_form_interceptor` を使用して行う。詳細は、 :ref:`inject_form_interceptor` を参照」— no class named InjectForm appears.
